description: Wave 1: 50 subjects across Compact (25), Veshan (15), Sable Reach (10). Includes 8 deliberate rejection prompts. Target: learn what works before scaling.
style_prefix: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background
negative: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

subjects.prompt: human male spacer in his early 20s with a shaved head and a nervous look, wearing a faded charcoal shipboard thermal undersuit with pressure seals at the wrists, a basic cargo harness with a single magnetic tool clip, scuffed mag-lock work boots, a laminated ship ID tag on a cord around his neck, the undersuit is standard issue and too big for him slightly bunching at the waist, a radiation dosimeter badge clipped to the chest, this is someone on his first tour

human female cargo handler in her late 50s with grey hair cropped short and hands that have loaded freight for thirty years, wearing a charcoal shipboard thermal undersuit faded almost to pale grey from thousands of decon cycles, a heavy reinforced cargo harness with multiple tool clips all occupied, mag-lock boots worn smooth at the soles, the undersuit has three visible heat-bonded repair patches and the harness leather is cracked with age

human male of south asian descent in his 30s with a thick beard and tired eyes, wearing a charcoal thermal undersuit with rolled-up sleeves showing forearm tattoos of ship registry numbers, a cargo harness with a handheld scanner and pry bar, mag-lock boots caked with cargo dust, the undersuit zipper pull has been replaced with a wire loop

human female ship mechanic in her early 20s with braided hair and a smudge of reactor coolant on her cheek, wearing khaki shipboard coveralls zipped up to the throat with the ship name stenciled on the breast pocket, a thin tool belt with precision instruments, lightweight deck shoes, safety glasses pushed up on her forehead, the coveralls are clean because she is new and careful, a trainee badge visible on the shoulder

human male chief engineer in his 50s with thick scarred hands and a permanent squint from decades of reading gauges in bad lighting, wearing stained dark olive coveralls with both sleeves torn off at the shoulder showing muscular tattooed arms, a heavy leather tool harness across his chest loaded with wrenches and circuit testers, steel-toe boots with welding burns, the coveralls are more stain than fabric at this point

human female junior officer in her late 20s with dark hair in a regulation bun and the stiff posture of someone trying too hard, wearing a new-looking steel-blue uniform jacket with a single rank tab at the collar, the jacket still has sharp creases from the packaging, regulation trousers and polished black shoes, she carries a data tablet like a shield, everything about her is regulation-perfect which makes her stand out as inexperienced

human male senior officer in his 60s with deep creases around his mouth and a white scar along his jaw from a decompression incident, wearing a steel-blue uniform jacket that has been tailored to fit him over the decades with two silver rank tabs and a ribbon bar that tells a long story, the jacket cuffs are slightly frayed, leather belt with a worn sidearm holster that has a visible mold of the weapon from years of carrying it

human female combat pilot in her 30s with a lean build and burn scar tissue on her left hand, wearing an olive pressure-rated flight suit with squadron patches heat-bonded to both shoulders, a quick-release flight harness with emergency transponder clips, fingerless interface gloves with conductive pads, zero-g boots with ankle locks, flight goggles around her neck, the suit has been through enough Gs to show permanent stress lines at the shoulders and knees

human male civilian shuttle pilot in his 40s with a paunch and a relaxed demeanor, wearing a faded tan flight suit with no military patches just a commercial license badge and a fuel company logo, a loose harness that he clearly does not cinch properly, comfortable slip-on deck shoes instead of regulation boots, a personal thermos clipped to his belt, he flies cargo shuttles between stations and treats it like driving a truck

human female combat medic in her 30s with close-cropped hair and a calm focused expression, wearing a charcoal tactical undersuit with a cream medical vest over it marked with a red cross on the back, a compact trauma pack on her right hip and a drug dispenser unit on her left, medical scanner hanging from a lanyard, nitrile gloves tucked into every pocket, blood-resistant boots, she looks like someone who works calmly while people are screaming

human male station commander in his late 60s on his final tour, wearing a navy bridge coat that has been recut twice to fit his changing frame over forty years, tarnished gold shoulder boards and cuff rings that he has stopped polishing, a leather document case so old the stitching has been re-done by hand, the coat has a small moth hole near the hem that he has not bothered to fix, comfortable broken-in boots, everything about him says tired authority

human male communications officer in his 30s with glasses and a pale complexion from living under artificial light, wearing a steel-blue uniform shirt with the top button undone and sleeves rolled to the elbows, a headset with a boom mic permanently around his neck even when off duty, data tablet in a hip holster, comfortable shoes not boots, the shirt has a coffee stain on the front that he has given up trying to remove

human female quartermaster in her 40s with reading glasses on a chain and an expression that says she knows where everything on this ship is, wearing a steel-blue uniform jacket buttoned to the throat with a supply department patch, a thick belt with a key ring holding magnetic access cards, a clipboard-style data tablet in one hand, sensible flat shoes, the jacket pockets bulge with pens and inventory tags

human male security chief in his 40s with a heavyweight build and a shaved head with a scar running across the crown, wearing a heavy charcoal ballistic vest with ceramic plate inserts over a steel-blue uniform, armored gauntlets, mag-lock assault boots with shin guards, a riot baton on one hip and an energy sidearm on the other, comm unit on the vest chest, the vest has impact marks from projectile rounds that were stopped by the plates

human male ship chaplain in his 50s with kind eyes and a beard going grey, wearing a simple charcoal thermal undersuit with no rank insignia and a plain dark cloth stole draped over the shoulders, a small personal effects bag on a belt, soft-soled shoes that make no sound on deck plating, a worn prayer book in his breast pocket, the only person on the ship who does not carry a tool or weapon

tall broad young reptilian alien with pale olive-green overlapping scales and an undeveloped bony crest ridge barely visible on the skull, heavy brow ridges over anxious amber slit-pupil eyes, a thin muscular tail held low showing nervousness, wearing a basic cured hide vest with no armor plates and no markings of any kind, leather leg wraps around digitigrade legs, bare clawed feet, the hide vest is stiff and cheap and clearly the lowest tier of equipment, this is someone who has not yet earned the right to bear a house mark

tall imposing reptilian alien with dark green-grey overlapping scales and a prominent bony crest ridge running from brow to crown, heavy brow ridges over fierce amber slit-pupil eyes, lipless jaw with visible teeth set in a permanent scowl, barrel chest with aggressive forward lean, thick scarred tail raised showing confidence, wearing dark bronze chest plate and pauldrons shaped to follow natural scale ridges with visible forge hammer marks, crimson Drashan house sash at waist over cured dark leather underpadding, a heavy curved blade sheathed at the hip, small Drashan house badge riveted to the left shoulder plate

tall broad female reptilian alien with bronze-toned overlapping scales and a slightly narrower crest ridge than males, amber slit-pupil eyes with a calculating look, muscular tail with a knotted leather tail-guard, wearing dark bronze chest plate shaped for her frame with a single pauldron on the weapon arm, crimson house sash at waist, cured leather arm wraps with bronze studs, a short stabbing spear mag-locked to her back, the armor shows a deliberate gouge on the chest plate that she wears as a battle honor

massive reptilian alien with dark green-grey scales scarred white from dozens of fights, a tall prominent crest ridge with an ornate metal crest-cap bolted directly to the bone, deep-set amber eyes under heavy scarred brow ridges, thick powerful tail held high, wearing heavy master-forged plate armor in dark bronze with tarnished gold trim and a crimson ceremonial cape split at the back for the tail, full house heraldry acid-etched across the chest plate, a belt of metal honor tokens clinking at the waist, a named two-handed blade with an ornate pommel at his side, the armor has intentional imperfections left by the house smith as a mark of handcraft

young reptilian alien with slate-grey scales and a training scar across the snout that he clearly got before earning the right to real combat, small undeveloped crest, amber eyes trying to look fierce, wearing a basic cured hide vest with crude stitching where he repaired it himself, no house markings but a leather cord around one wrist that might be a personal token, bare clawed feet, a simple practice blade in a worn sheath, the tail twitches with barely contained energy

female reptilian alien with dark olive scales and a crest ridge bearing three notch-marks filed into the bone indicating kills, amber eyes that have seen too many fights, a tail with a missing tip from an old wound, wearing layered bronze plate armor over dark leather with a crimson sash faded from sun and salt, house crest on the chest plate scratched and re-etched after being damaged in combat, multiple honor tokens on the belt some of them taken from defeated opponents, a heavy cleaver-blade worn edge-down on the back

enormous reptilian alien with dark green scales gone grey at the jaw and crest from age, a massive bony crest ridge bearing an ancestral crown-cap of black iron and gold, amber eyes gone pale with decades of command, thick heavy tail that moves slowly and deliberately, wearing ancestral plate armor that has been repaired and reforged across three generations of wearers with each repair visible as a different metal tone, a blood-crimson cloak trimmed in black-gold covering one shoulder, a debt-ledger seal on a chain at the waist, no weapon visible because a House Lord does not need to threaten

thin human male in his 20s with hollow cheeks and darting eyes, wearing threadbare clothes that were once a Compact regulation undersuit but have been patched so many times the original fabric is barely visible, one sleeve torn off and replaced with a mismatched piece of canvas, no shoes just wrapped feet, a crude shiv tucked into a rope belt, no marks no affiliation no identity, someone who arrived in the Reach with nothing and has not yet taken enough to matter

human female in her 30s with a shaved head and a crude faction brand burned into her forearm, wearing mismatched salvaged armor pieces strapped over a torn thermal undersuit, one shoulder plate clearly cut from ship hull plating and welded to a leather strap, a Compact-issue sidearm with the serial number filed off holstered in a handmade kydex holster, boots from two different pairs one black one brown, rust and ash color palette, she has chosen a side and the brand proves it

human male in his 40s with a distinctive facial scar and a confident stance, wearing a signature outfit assembled from quality stolen pieces including a Veshan bronze pauldron on one shoulder and a Compact officer coat cut down to a vest on the torso, dark leather trousers and heavy boots taken from someone who no longer needs them, a custom-modified energy weapon with an extended barrel holstered in a thigh rig, personal color palette of black and rust-red emerging from the chaos, people in the Reach know this silhouette

human female pirate captain in her 50s with silver-streaked hair and eyes that have calculated a thousand margins, wearing an unmistakable signature coat assembled from a Compact commander navy overcoat with the insignia ripped off and Veshan bronze clasps added, beneath it a practical black thermal undersuit with concealed armor panels, tall boots with mag-lock soles, a slim data pad on one hip and an ornate pistol on the other that was clearly taken from someone important, her crew dress in echo of her color palette of navy and bronze and black

a Keth arthropod alien who has ended up in the Sable Reach, shorter than human with warm ivory chitin showing stress cracks from poor nutrition, four arms with the lower pair holding improvised tools, compound eyes dulled, wearing scraps of what was once a Keth bio-film harness now dry and cracking overlaid with salvaged human thermal fabric tied in place with wire, the original colony glyph on the thorax has been scored through, this is someone cut off from the Communion

a young Veshan reptilian who left or was expelled from their house before being blooded, dark grey-green scales, small crest with no cap or markings, tail held at a neutral angle neither proud nor submissive, wearing a mix of crude leather armor and stolen Compact uniform pieces, no house markings anywhere, a salvaged blade with no pommel insignia, the scales show stress-pattern discoloration from living outside the social structure they were built for

human male space soldier in a sleek form-fitting white and blue bodysuit with glowing accents and a holographic visor, standing in a heroic pose with legs apart and arms crossed, clean pristine futuristic armor with no visible wear or damage, bright blue LED strips along the arms and legs, smooth aerodynamic helmet, the outfit looks like it was designed by a committee for a video game cover, everything is symmetric and perfect and new

human female ship officer in a perfectly pressed steel-blue uniform with razor-sharp creases and gleaming gold buttons, not a single scuff or stain anywhere, the fabric looks freshly manufactured, brand new polished boots that have never touched a deck plate, she stands with perfect posture in front of a clean white background, everything about her looks like a recruitment poster not a real person

tall reptilian alien warrior wearing a Compact-style pressed regulation uniform jacket in steel-blue with stamped metal rank tabs, the jacket has straight rectangular lines and machine-made seams that completely contradict Veshan forged aesthetic, no house markings no crimson sash no honor tokens, the uniform fights against the natural scale ridges instead of following them

human male captain in a one-piece stretchy uniform in solid red with a metallic badge on the chest, black ankle boots, the uniform has no pockets no tools no belt no harness nothing functional, it clings to the body like athletic wear, there are no visible seams patches repairs or signs of use, the fabric is a single solid color with no variation in tone or texture, he stands on a clean carpeted bridge

young woman with impossibly large eyes and bright pink hair in a skin-tight white and purple space suit with decorative fins and flowing ribbons, exaggerated hourglass proportions, a tiny impractical laser pistol, knee-high heeled boots with no mag-locks, sparkling particle effects around her, the outfit prioritizes visual appeal over any functional purpose

massively muscular human male space marine in gleaming silver power armor with a flowing cape and dramatic backlighting, standing in a powerful wide-legged heroic pose with a giant energy sword, the armor is ornate with eagle motifs and skulls and decorative scrollwork, not a scratch or dent anywhere, the cape billows in a wind that does not exist on a spaceship, everything about this screams main character in a power fantasy not a working person

reptilian Veshan warrior wearing an Orryn-style flowing curved teal vest with magnetic clips over Compact-style pressed rectangular trousers with Keth bio-luminescent accessories, the outfit combines shape languages and material vocabularies from four different civilizations in a way that no actual person in this universe would dress, it looks like a costume designer grabbed random pieces from different factions

human male wearing blue jeans and a plain white t-shirt with modern running sneakers and a baseball cap, a smartphone in his back pocket, a contemporary wristwatch, he looks like he just walked out of a coffee shop on present-day Earth, there is nothing about this person that suggests spacefaring civilization or any faction identity or any wear from shipboard life

variations.note: Same style, different seed — tests consistency
